scripts.deploy: npx cdk bootstrap aws://$(aws sts get-caller-identity --query Account --output text)/ap-northeast-1 aws://$(aws sts get-caller-identity --query Account --output text)/us-east-1 && npx cdk deploy --all --require-approval never --concurrency 10
scripts.destroy:users: npx cdk destroy $(npx cdk list 2>/dev/null | grep -v -e EdgeAuth -e Vpc | tr '\n' ' ') --force --concurrency 10
scripts.destroy:edge: npx cdk destroy $(npx cdk list 2>/dev/null | grep EdgeAuth | tr '\n' ' ') --force --concurrency 10
scripts.destroy:shared: npx cdk destroy $(npx cdk list 2>/dev/null | grep Vpc | tr '\n' ' ') --force
